trickyParts: isTransientError must handle multiple error shapes: status codes on error objects, error names (TimeoutError, TypeError), and message patterns (overloaded, rate limit). API providers use different conventions.

The fallback chain integration with retry: retries happen BEFORE fallback, and non-transient errors skip both retry and fallback (thrown immediately). Only transient errors after retry exhaustion trigger fallback.
deviations: None — followed the issue directive exactly
